name: electron-starter-react
description: Electron + React starter for importing spreadsheet rows as posts and preparing multipart uploads
author: OpenAI

scripts.build:win: npm run build:web && electron-builder -c electron-builder.yml --win nsis
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:web && electron-builder -c electron-builder.yml --mac dmg
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:web && electron-builder -c electron-builder.yml --linux AppImage
